summary: SCA attributes its below-target on-time-or-early completion rate for capital improvement projects to lingering COVID-19-era supply chain disruptions, stating the Authority is "still recovering" from these impacts even as the share of projects finished on time or early climbed from 31% in FY23 to 53% in FY25.

sources.label: NYC School Construction Authority, Fiscal 2025 Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: increasing, though SCA says it's still recovering from COVID supply-chain impacts
